threats.title: MuddyWater Uses Microsoft Teams to Steal Credentials in False Flag Ransomware Attack
threats.summary: The Iranian state-sponsored hacking group known as MuddyWater (aka Mango Sandstorm, Seedworm, and Static Kitten) has been attributed to a ransomware attack in what has been described as a "false flag" operation. threats.title: The Hacker News Launches 'Cybersecurity Stars Awards 2026' — Submissions Now Open
threats.summary: For nearly 20 years, we at The Hacker News have mostly told scary stories about cyberspace — big hacks, broken systems, and new threats. But behind every headline, there’s a quieter, better story. threats.summary: Google has announced expanded Binary Transparency for Android as a way to safeguard the ecosystem from supply chain attacks. threats.title: Windows Phone Link Exploited by CloudZ RAT to Steal Credentials and OTPs
threats.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of an intrusion that involved the use of a CloudZ remote access tool (RAT) and a previous undocumented plugin dubbed Pheno with the aim of facilitating credential theft.
